branch.branch_summary: After v6.7.0, run a runtime-backed direction review before opening the next implementation task. Candidate direction is v6.8 Executable Quality Ledger, but do not open implementation work until situation-assess, release-state-audit, and Council review confirm the bounded next frontier. QIF boundary: direction selection is planning evidence, not proof that the next frontier is semantically optimal.

tree_answer.where_are_we: The runtime is between v6.7 and the next concrete branch.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Advance v6.7 Verifiable Governance: make missing archmap impact dispositions, self-attested review provenance, and low-independence evidence machine-detectable so release sign-off can fail on structural self-attestation instead of trusting maker claims.
